description: Phase 9 feedback lifecycle. Feedback stages candidates and requires eval gates before any production route change.

states.name: feedback_received
states.description: User or verification feedback is recorded

states.name: redacted
states.description: Raw task and sensitive fields are redacted or hashed

states.name: eval_gate
states.description: Route, workflow, skill, and cost evals must pass

states.name: reviewed
states.description: Human or release review accepts the staged candidate

states.name: promoted
states.description: A separate promotion commit updates production registries

transitions.guard: production routing is changed only by explicit promotion commit
